pdg_node.statement: () -> StateModelSpec — immutable snapshot of all initialized fields (covariance P, process noise Q, observation noise R, latent mean/variance, and RNG state)
pdg_node.informal_desc: Bootstraps the StateEstimator instance: allocates internal containers, sets default hyperparameters, and establishes the initial state model ready for predict/update cycles.

declaration.name: stateestimatorinit
declaration.type_signature: () -> StateModelSpec — immutable snapshot of all initialized fields (covariance P, process noise Q, observation noise R, latent mean/variance, and RNG state)
declaration.docstring: Bootstraps the StateEstimator instance: allocates internal containers, sets default hyperparameters, and establishes the initial state model ready for predict/update cycles.
declaration.conceptual_summary: ProbabilisticLatentSpaceInitializer. Allocates and freezes a complete probabilistic state representation by instantiating all parametric containers — covariance matrices, noise spectral density tensors, latent mean vector, and a seeded stochastic generator — into a self-consistent, immutable snapshot. The operation establishes the zero-time prior distribution over a latent continuous state space, ensuring all uncertainty quantification structures satisfy positive-semi-definiteness constraints before any recursive inference cycle begins. No observations are consumed; this is a pure structural bootstrap that defines the algebraic scaffolding upon which subsequent predict/update operators will act.. Applications: Robotics & SLAM: Initializing the prior belief distribution (pose covariance, map uncertainty) for an Extended Kalman Filter or particle filter before a mobile agent begins sensor-fusion-based simultaneous localization and mapping., Computational Neuroscience: Bootstrapping a Bayesian brain model's prior latent neural-state distribution — mean firing rate vector and inter-neuron covariance — before online electrophysiological observation streams are ingested for neural decoding., Structural Health Monitoring: Constructing the initial uncertainty model over hidden material-stress latent variables (with process noise seeded from thermal expansion coefficients) before strain-gauge telemetry enters a recursive damage-detection filter., Quantitative Ecology: Seeding a state-space population dynamics model with prior distributions over hidden sub-population counts and demographic noise tensors before longitudinal survey observations drive iterative inference over species abundance trajectories.

pdg_node.informal_desc: Entry-point pure transform for inverse Schmitt trigger behavior. No sub-methods, mutable attributes, or config-gated branches were provided, so this is modeled as a single stateless atom.

declaration.name: inverse_schmitt_trigger_transform
declaration.docstring: Entry-point pure transform for inverse Schmitt trigger behavior. No sub-methods, mutable attributes, or config-gated branches were provided, so this is modeled as a single stateless atom.
declaration.conceptual_summary: hysteretic_inverted_bistable_threshold_mapper. Transforms a numeric signal into a two-state output by applying dual-threshold switching with inverted polarity. State changes occur only when the signal crosses the outer bounds; values inside the intermediate band preserve the previously emitted state, creating hysteresis. Over ordered samples, this yields a piecewise-constant state trajectory that suppresses rapid oscillations caused by near-boundary noise.. Applications: Biomedical instrumentation: convert noisy continuous sensor waveforms into stable phase/event labels for downstream analysis., Robotics and embedded control: debounced mode switching from fluctuating proximity, force, or orientation measurements., Communication systems: robust symbol/state gating from analog channel metrics that fluctuate around decision boundaries., Infrastructure monitoring: persistent regime-change detection from vibration or strain amplitudes under high measurement noise.

pdg_node.informal_desc: Represents the entry-point stage with no observable computation, state access, or side effects.

declaration.name: torqueadjustmentidentitystage
declaration.docstring: Represents the entry-point stage with no observable computation, state access, or side effects.
declaration.conceptual_summary: NullaryIdentityStage. Implements an identity morphism at a pipeline boundary: execution occurs, but no data is consumed, produced, or mutated. It preserves global system state and observable behavior exactly, serving only as a structural anchor for composition, scheduling, or replacement.. Applications: Compiler engineering: placeholder transformation pass used to preserve pass-order scaffolding before optimization logic is introduced., Workflow orchestration in laboratory automation: explicit start node that enforces graph structure without altering any measurement stream., Distributed systems testing: inert stage inserted to validate tracing, scheduling, and dependency wiring independently of functional computation., Control-system simulation: baseline stage representing zero control action to isolate plant dynamics from controller effects.
